subcategory: 3D testimonial book with page flip animation
use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials in an interactive 3D book format for landing pages
Creating engaging testimonial showcases for portfolio or product pages
Showcasing reviews and social proof with page-flipping navigation on business websites
ai_summary: A 3D book-style testimonial component that renders customer reviews in a page-flipping book format. Uses the HTMLFlipBook library to create realistic page-turn animations with configurable shadow effects, flipping time, and responsive portrait/landscape modes. Features swipe support for mobile and customizable testimonial content including images, ratings, names, and job titles. Ideal for displaying social proof in an engaging, interactive format that mimics a physical testimonial book.
